name: scout_configure
description: Configure Scout Board credentials at runtime. Use action=set to connect, action=status to inspect, action=clear to remove credentials. Pass save=true to persist to ~/.scout-mcp.json.

arguments.name: baseUrl
arguments.desc: Scout Board server URL, e.g. https://scout.example.com:22160 (required for action=set)

arguments.name: domain
arguments.desc: Domain — leave empty if not required

arguments.name: save
arguments.desc: Persist credentials to ~/.scout-mcp.json for future sessions (default: false)

arguments.name: test
arguments.desc: Test the connection before applying (default: true)

name: health_check
description: Check Scout Board server availability. mode=ping for unauthenticated availability check, mode=healthcheck for authenticated system status.

arguments.name: license
arguments.desc: Include license info in healthcheck response

arguments.name: subscription
arguments.desc: Include subscription info in healthcheck response

arguments.name: scoutServer
arguments.desc: Include Scout server info in healthcheck response

arguments.name: scoutKeepAlive
arguments.desc: Include keep-alive server info in healthcheck response

arguments.name: scoutDatabase
arguments.desc: Include database info in healthcheck response

name: ou_get
description: Read OU (Organisational Unit) information from Scout Board. Modes: get, root, search, subordinate, structure, device_status.

arguments.name: mode
arguments.desc: get | root | search | subordinate | structure | device_status

arguments.name: properties
arguments.desc: Comma-separated list of extra properties to return

arguments.name: onlyFirstLevel
arguments.desc: Return only first level of structure tree (mode=structure)

name: ou_manage
description: Create, rename, delete, or move OUs in Scout Board, and export/import OU structures. DESTRUCTIVE: action=delete permanently removes an OU.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: add | rename | delete | move | converttobase | structure_export | structure_import

arguments.name: forceDeleteOUFilter
arguments.desc: Delete affected OU filters when deleting OU

name: device_get
description: Read device information from Scout Board. Modes: get (single device), search (devices in OU), status (runtime status), configOrigins (configuration inheritance).

arguments.name: ouPath
arguments.desc: OU path to search in (required for mode=search)

arguments.name: ouId
arguments.desc: OU ID to search in (required for mode=search)

arguments.name: includeSubOus
arguments.desc: Include devices from sub-OUs in search

name: device_manage
description: Add, rename, delete, or move devices in Scout Board. DESTRUCTIVE: action=delete permanently removes a device.

arguments.name: newDeviceMac
arguments.desc: MAC address for the new device (action=add)

name: device_command
description: Send a command to a device, device list, OU, or DDG. DESTRUCTIVE: factoryreset and halt require confirm=true.

arguments.name: command
arguments.desc: restart | halt | start | factoryreset | update | updateuefi | custom | predefined | delivery | message

arguments.name: confirm
arguments.desc: Must be true for command=factoryreset or halt

arguments.name: body
arguments.desc: Optional JSON body for scheduling and InformUser options

name: device_diagnostics
description: Collect device diagnostics asynchronously. Workflow: trigger → poll until ready → download_url to get the ZIP link.

arguments.name: diagnosticsFileId
arguments.desc: File ID from poll response (required for action=download_url)

name: app_list
description: List applications from Scout Board. scope=base for global applications, scope=ou for OU-scoped applications.

arguments.name: ouId
arguments.desc: OU ID (alternative to ouPath when scope=ou)

name: app_manage
description: Create, delete, copy, move, or configure inheritance for Scout Board applications. DESTRUCTIVE: action=delete permanently removes an application.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: create | delete | copy | move | get_inheritance | set_inheritance

arguments.name: applicationType
arguments.desc: Application type, e.g. citrix, rdp (required for action=create)

name: config_get
description: Read configuration from Scout Board for base, OU, or device scope. Provide target and section (e.g. general, firmware, network/lan).

arguments.name: section
arguments.desc: Config section path, e.g. general, firmware, network/lan, desktop/language, powermanagement/eco

name: config_update
description: Write configuration to Scout Board for base, OU, or device scope. Changes take effect when the device syncs.

arguments.name: section
arguments.desc: Config section path, e.g. general, firmware, network/lan

name: label_manage
description: Manage dynamic configuration labels in Scout Board. Labels are used with Rules to drive dynamic device configuration.

name: rule_manage
description: Manage dynamic configuration rules in Scout Board. Rules use condition expressions to assign labels to devices.

arguments.name: action
arguments.desc: list | get | create | update | delete | validate | link_label | update_label_priority | unlink_label

name: schedule_manage
description: View and manage scheduled commands in Scout Board. Actions: get_ou, get_device, update, delete.

name: maintenance_window_manage
description: Manage maintenance windows in Scout Board. Maintenance windows define time periods when device updates and commands are allowed.

name: notification_manage
description: Set or delete notifications in Scout Board for device configuration changes, firmware updates, deliveries, or device relocations.

arguments.name: body
arguments.desc: Request body for devicelist/ddg targets and delivery options
